'''shazudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okurihikiotoshi|okurihikiotoshi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okurihikiotoshi|okurihikiotoshi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shazudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shæzidhith || shæzidhij || shæzidhish || shæzidhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || shazuzudhuth || shazuzudhuj || shazuzudhush || shazuzudhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || shazudhuth || shazudhuj || shazudhush || shazudhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || shazufdhufth || shazufdhufj || shazufdhufsh || shazufdhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || shazudhuthu || shazudhuju || shazudhushu || shazudhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || shazudhuth || shazudhuj || shazudhush || shazudhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || shazudhuthul || shazudhujul || shazudhushul || shazudhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || shazudhuuthuthu || shazudhuujuju || shazudhuushushu || shazudhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || shazudhuthun || shazudhujun || shazudhushun || shazudhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || shazudhuthuoro || shazudhujuoro || shazudhushuoro || shazudhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
